faq.question: How accurate is the fake news detection?
faq.answer: Our AI model achieves over 95% accuracy on diverse datasets, with continuous improvements through user feedback and ongoing research.

faq.question: Is my data secure and private?
faq.answer: Yes, we take privacy seriously. All analyses are processed securely, and we don't store personal information without explicit consent.

faq.question: Can I use this for commercial purposes?
faq.answer: We offer various licensing options for commercial use. Please contact our partnerships team for more information.

faq.question: How can I contribute to improving the system?
faq.answer: You can provide feedback on analyses, report issues, or contribute to our open-source projects on GitHub.
